title: Daily Memo: Ceasefire in Iran, Defense Changes in France
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Pause in hostilities. The U.S. and Iran agreed on Tuesday to a two-week ceasefire. Under the plan, both Iran and Oman will be allowed to charge tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran’s National Security Council confirmed that talks with Washington would begin on Friday in the Pakistani capital, Islamabad, based on […]

full_text:
Pause in hostilities. The U.S. and Iran agreed on Tuesday to a two-week ceasefire. Under the plan, both Iran and Oman will be allowed to charge tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran’s National Security Council confirmed that talks with Washington would begin on Friday in the Pakistani capital, Islamabad, based on […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
